comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (6/8, Allegretto) mm1-21 with heavy v1/v2 stacking (107% ratio). Refrain (2/2, Tempo di Fox Trot) mm23-61 with repeat. Pipeline read 'Fox Trot' direction as lyrics (m29), displaced lyrics across refrain measures, and left large GAPs in intro (mm23-28) and bridge (mm38-43). Verse v1: 'Near Barcelona the peasant croons...' Verse v2: 'You may dislike, or you may adore...' De-interleaved to v1 throughout.
